metadata.description: Marketplace for the agentic-harness Claude Code plugin

plugins.name: agentic-harness
plugins.description: Stand up, assess, and maintain an agentic harness in an existing repo — generate project-specific agent teams and the skills they use, assess how effectively they are used, advise on spec-driven development systems and agent-suited issue trackers, generate a dual-tracker sync when a repo-native and a human tracker coexist, and run a kaizen retrospective that files tool-improvement feedback upstream
